title: Mossy Oak Pruning Saw, Folding Hand Saw with Secure Lock, 3 Blades Made of Cr-V and 65Mn, for Wood, Bone, PVC, Tree Pruning, Camping, Hunting, Non-Ferrous Metal, Solid TPR Soft Grip and Portable Pouch
features: ✅【High Strength Blades】 NOTE: Please read the manual and be careful before first use, as one blade cames pre-fitted. Mossy Oak pruning saw blades are made of 65Mn and 58Cr-V and sharp for smooth, fast and clear sawing. Diverse sharp teeth (5 TPI/11TPI/18 TPI), coated for less friction & resistance with each pull for quicker sawing

✅【Multi-Purpose Utility】 Featuring triple-cut razor sharp teeth, the folding hand saw can easily cuts wood, tree, bone(use metal blade) and plastic, non-ferrous metal, be a great help in the bush for trail maintenance or while camping or constructing shelter

✅【Soft Solid Handle】 Ergonomic slip-resistant comfort grip handle features with TPR rubber coated. The proper size can work with any hand size. The rugged razor tooth blade remains stable during strong pulls resulting in accurate cuts

✅【Secure Lock】 Lock System prevents the blade from accidental close during use. Push the green button and fold the saw blade, store it in your pocket when it's idle. Before putting into use, take the folding saw out from the sheath, open and stretch the saw blade and lock it

✅【Nylon Pouch 】 Nylon sheath in the package, can hold hand saw and 2 additional replaced blades as well, easy and safe to carry multi-purpose tool for utility job.Take different blades for REAL WORK of wood, bone, plastic according to the actual situation
